stages.concept:
# Unit 036: 부사의 역할 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **부사의 역할**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> She sings **beautifully**.
> 그녀는 아름답게 노래한다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 부사는 **동사, 형용사, 다른 부사, 또는 문장 전체**를 꾸며주는 말이에요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **동사**를 꾸밀 때:

> He runs **fast**.
> 그는 빠르게 달린다.

> She speaks English **well**.
> 그녀는 영어를 잘 말한다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **형용사**를 꾸밀 때:

> This flower is **very** beautiful.
> 이 꽃은 매우 아름답다.

> The movie was **really** interesting.
> 그 영화는 정말 재미있었다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **다른 부사**를 꾸밀 때:

> She sings **very** well.
> 그녀는 매우 잘 노래한다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 많은 부사는 형용사에 **-ly**를 붙여서 만들어요.

> slow → **slowly** / quick → **quickly** / careful → **carefully**
> beautiful → **beautifully** / happy → **happily**

👩‍🏫 선생님: 하지만 형용사와 부사의 형태가 **같은** 경우도 있어요.

> fast(빠른/빠르게), hard(열심인/열심히), early(이른/일찍), late(늦은/늦게)

🧑‍🎓 학생: 부사는 동사, 형용사, 부사를 꾸며주고, 대부분 형용사에 -ly를 붙여서 만드는 거군요!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 036: 수와 양을 나타내는 형용사 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
My sister has (     ) colorful pencils.
> **정답** many

---

**02.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
There's (     ) apples left in the box.
> **정답** few

---

**03.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Would you like (     ) warm milk?
> **정답** some

---

**04.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
There is (     ) snow on the mountain.
> **정답** a lot of

---

**05.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
We don't have (     ) money to spend.
> **정답** much

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
There is many water in the pool.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** many → much

---

**07.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He has much books on his shelf.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** much → many

---

**08.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
There are a few milk in the glass.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** a few → a little

---

**09.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She drank a little cups of tea.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** a little → a few

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
There isn't many sugar left.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** many → much

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
상자에 사과가 많이 있다.
There are apples in the box.
> **정답** many

---

**12.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
커피에 설탕이 약간 있다.
There is sugar in the coffee.
> **정답** a little

---

**13.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀는 시간이 별로 없다.
She doesn't have time.
> **정답** much

---

**14.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
친구가 몇 명 왔다.
friends came.
> **정답** A few

---

**15.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그 가게에는 과일이 많이 있다.
The store has fruit.
> **정답** a lot of

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그는 친구가 많다.
friends has He many
> **정답** He / has / many / friends

---

**17.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
물이 좀 필요합니다.
some water need I
> **정답** I / need / some / water

---

**18.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
우유가 거의 없다.
milk little There a is
> **정답** There / is / little / milk

---

**19.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
학생이 많지 않다.
aren't students There many
> **정답** There / aren't / many / students

---

**20.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
접시에 음식이 많이 있다.
of food There is lot a on the plate
> **정답** There / is / a / lot / of / food / on / the / plate
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 036: 수와 양을 나타내는 형용사 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Amy didn't have _____________ money, so she
borrowed _____________ money from her friends.
many - any
many - some
much - any
much - some
> **정답** much - some

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Tom didn't have ________________ time.
So he wrote his essay very quickly, but he made
______________ mistakes.
much - little
many - few
many - little
much - few
> **정답** much - few

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Jake is on a diet. He eats ________________ times a
day, but eats ____________ each time.
many - a few
much - little
a lot of - few
many - a little
> **정답** many - a little

---

**04.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
She is very busy. She has much things to do.
I am going away for a few days next week.
You did well. You made few mistakes on the
test.
He needed a little fresh air.
> **정답** She is very busy. She has much things to do.

---

**05.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The photographer took a few pictures the
other day.
We have some plans for you.
Excuse me, can I ask you a little questions?
She asked for a little sugar in her tea.
> **정답** Excuse me, can I ask you a little questions?

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그를 잘 아는 사람은 거의 없다.
A few people know him well.
Some people know him well.
Few people know him well.
A lot of people know him well.
> **정답** Few people know him well.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
그 방에 가구가 많지 않았다.
There wasn't much furniture in the room.
There wasn't a little furniture in the room.
There wasn't a lot of furniture in the room.
There weren't many furniture in the room.
> **정답** There wasn't a lot of furniture in the room., There
wasn't much furniture in the room.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 생각할 시간이 좀 필요하다.
Amy needs few time to think.
Amy needs a few time to think.
Amy needs a little time to think.
Amy needs little time to think.
> **정답** Amy needs a little time to think.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
There is a few hope. Let's pray.
I am hungry, but I don't have any food to eat.
It takes many years to be a doctor.
He is very shy and has few friends.
> **정답** There is a few hope. Let's pray.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I have few money. I should save some.
The boy had a little homework.
The cook mixed many eggs and a little milk.
She only needs a few friends.
> **정답** I have few money. I should save some.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
도로에 차가 거의 없어서 카페까지 몇 분 안 걸렸다.
There were a few cars on the road, so it took
few minutes to the cafe.
There were a little cars on the road, so it took
little minutes to the cafe.
There were little cars on the road, so it took a
little minutes to the cafe.
There were few cars on the road, so it took a
few minutes to the cafe.
> **정답** There were few cars on the road, so it took a few
minutes to the cafe.

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 오늘 숙제가 조금 있었다.
Tom had little homework.
Tom had few homework.
Tom had a little homework.
Tom had a few homework.
> **정답** Tom had a little homework.

---

**13.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
디저트로 케이크를 드시겠습니까?
Would you like much cake for dessert?
Would you like many cake for dessert?
Would you like any cake for dessert?
Would you like some cake for dessert?
> **정답** Would you like some cake for dessert?

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
She has a lot of time before the meeting.
I saw this stranger much times around my
house.
Tom doesn't know some students in his class.
Dad put a few black pepper onto his meal.
> **정답** She has a lot of time before the meeting.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
I will give you a few advice.
He has few time to take a break.
Amy invited a little people to her party.
There was little traffic, so the man could drive
fast.
> **정답** There was little traffic, so the man could drive fast.

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The cook poured a few flour
into a bowl.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** a few → a little

---

**17.** 문장에서 틀린부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰세요.
Amy had a lot of time,
so she read a little books
today.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** a little → a few

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
My mother bought any meat to
cook dinner.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** any → some

---

**19.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 다음 글을 완성하시오.
[much, a few, a little, some]
For today's soup, the cook prepared
onions and
butter. Then he began to mix eggs and a
little flour to make bread. He didn't have
time, so he put everything into a oven.
> **정답** a few (some), a little, some, much

---

**20.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 다음 글을 완성하시오.
[some, many, much]
English lesson was very difficult. So, students had
questions. But the teacher didn't have
time. So, I asked friends questions.
They helped me a lot.
> **정답** many, much, some
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 036 수와 양을 나타내는 형용사중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 그림을 보고 알맞은 수량 형용사를 이용하여 문장을
![그림](public/images/units/032_desc_01.webp)
완성하시오.
[book]
There were  (     )   (     )  in the library.
정답 many (a lot of), books

---

**02.** 그림을 보고 알맞은 수량 형용사를 이용하여 문장을
![그림](public/images/units/032_desc_02.webp)
완성하시오.
[traffic]
There was  (     )   (     )  on the road, so he was
late to work.
• traffic 차량들, 교통(량)
정답 much (a lot of), traffic

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (수량 형용사 추가)
민호는 어제 숙제를 할 시간이 거의 없었다.
힌트 (     ) have, time
Minho  (     )   (     )   (     )  to do his homework
yesterday.
정답 had, little, time

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (수량 형용사 추가)
Amy는 친구가 거의 없다.
힌트 (     ) have, friend
Amy  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 has, few, friends

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (수량 형용사 추가)
그녀는 그에게서 돈을 조금 빌렸다.
힌트 (     ) borrow, money
She  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  from him.
정답 borrowed, a, little, money

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (수량 형용사 추가)
그의 건강에 약간의 문제가 있다.
힌트 (     ) problem
There are  (     )   (     )   (     )  to his health.
정답 a, few, problems

---

**07.** some 이나 any를 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
내 여동생은 아침에 약간의 과일을 먹는다.
My sister eats  (     )  fruit in the morning.
정답 some

---

**08.** some 이나 any를 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
저는 당신의 도움은 필요 없어요.
I don't need  (     )  help from you.
정답 any

---

**09.** 글을 읽고 빈칸에 다음 중 알맞은 말을 이용하여 글을
완성하시오.
[a few, a little, many, much]
Tom had  (     )  things to buy, so
he ran to the store. Because it was very late at
night, there weren't  (     )  people on the street. He
didn't have  (     )  time because it was almost
time to close the store. So, he ran
 faster.
정답 a few, many (a lot of), much ( a lot of), a little

---

**10.** 글을 읽고 빈칸에 다음 중 알맞은 말을 이용하여 글을
완성하시오.
[a few, few]
Amy was studying English. She is good at it,
because she lived in the U.S for 
years. She usually makes  (     )  mistakes on
English tests. She almost always gets a perfect
score in English.
정답 a few, few

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 036: 수와 양을 나타내는 형용사 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Jake didn't have _____________ money, so he borrowed _____________ money from his parents.
many - any many - some much - any much - some
> 정답: much - some

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Amy didn't have ________________ time.
So she wrote her report very quickly, but she made ______________ errors.
much - little many - few many - little much - few
> 정답: much - few

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom is on a diet.
He eats ________________ times a day, but eats ____________ each time.
many - a few much - little a lot of - few many - a little
> 정답: many - a little

---

**04.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He is very tired.
He has much work to do.
I am going away for a few weeks next month.
You did great.
You made few errors on the quiz.
She needed a little rest.
> 정답: He is very tired. He has much work to do.

---

**05.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The artist drew a few pictures last weekend.
We have some plans for the trip.
Excuse me, can I ask you a little questions?
She put a little honey in her tea.
> 정답: Excuse me, can I ask you a little questions?

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그를 잘 아는 사람은 거의 없다.
A few people know him well.
Some people know him well.
Few people know him well.
A lot of people know him well.
> 정답: Few people know him well.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) 그 방에 가구가 많지 않았다.
There wasn't much furniture in the room.
There wasn't a little furniture in the room.
There wasn't a lot of furniture in the room.
There weren't many furniture in the room.
> 정답: There wasn't a lot of furniture in the room., There

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Kevin은 쉴 시간이 좀 필요하다.
Kevin needs few time to rest.
Kevin needs a few time to rest.
Kevin needs a little time to rest.
Kevin needs little time to rest.
> 정답: Kevin needs a little time to rest.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
There is a few hope.
Let's try again.
I am thirsty, but I don't have any water to drink.
It takes many years to be a doctor.
He is very quiet and has few friends.
> 정답: There is a few hope. Let's try again.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I have few money.
I should save some.
The girl had a little homework.
The baker mixed many eggs and a little butter.
She only needs a few pencils.
> 정답: I have few money. I should save some.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
길에 사람이 거의 없어서 학교까지 몇 분 안 걸렸다.
There were a few people on the street, so it took few minutes to the school.
There were a little people on the street, so it took little minutes to the school.
There were little people on the street, so it took a little minutes to the school.
There were few people on the street, so it took a few minutes to the school.
> 정답: There were few people on the street, so it took a few
